Detokenizer Full Manual Test Fixture

This page is for fast human smoke testing. Every section below is clearly labeled and intentionally packed with approved test tokens plus a few unknown tokens that should remain unchanged.

Expected approved replacements: [<TOKEN-Name-J>] -> James, [<TOKEN-Name-M>] -> Marc, [<TOKEN-Name-E>] -> Ed, [<TOKEN-Name-JM>] -> Jay, [<TOKEN-Name-D>] -> Daniel.

DOM And Editable Surfaces

Surface Fixture Expected
Plain text Employee: [<TOKEN-Name-J>] Employee: James
Unknown token Unknown stays: [<TOKEN-Name-X>] Still shows [<TOKEN-Name-X>]
Rich text split [<TOKEN-Name-D>] Daniel
Input value James Marc
Placeholder Lookup Jay
Textarea Ed plus unknown token unchanged
Contenteditable
[<TOKEN-Name-M>] [<TOKEN-Name-X>]
 Marc plus unknown token unchanged
Attribute-only image alt and title detokenized

Shadow, Async, And Frame Coverage

Async token pending...

Visible OCR Surfaces

Image Surface

Rendered as inline SVG with visible token text.

Canvas Surface

Rendered with visible token text directly on the canvas.
